T0104.title: Data Cleaning
T0104.definition: The process of filtering, deduplicating, and formatting raw illegally obtained data.
T0104.description: Fraudsters clean up messy raw data by removing invalid, duplicate, or erroneous entries, transforming it into well-structured, ready-to-use “premium material.” Laundered data commands higher prices on the market and is often used for targeted scams or fraudulent loan applications, significantly boosting the efficiency of downstream crimes.

references.title: Black Market Big Data: 2024 Data Leakage Risk Landscape Report
